same HTTP layer migration (PR 24446) applies — text filter path is distinct from date/number and should be tested separately"},{"id":100363,"name":"OData feed in Excel - data validation between Feed and Warehouse","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"should-run","reasoning":"OData data validation; PR 24446 HTTP migration could introduce data serialisation differences; warehouse vs feed comparison catches regressions"},{"id":92131,"name":"Modeller - Warehouse Sql pipeline preview loads with correct results","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"should-run","reasoning":"Warehouse SQL pipeline preview; PR 24511 (SQL generation UI changes) could affect how SQL is generated and previewed in pipelines"},{"id":105783,"name":"Clustered columnstore storage option for staging and warehouse tables","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"should-run","reasoning":"Clustered columnstore storage; PR 24516 fixes storage engine check for measure naming — columnstore option selection could be affected"},{"id":97149,"name":"Modeller - Offline Datasource supports composite tables","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"should-run","reasoning":"NAV offline datasource composite tables; PR 24474 fixes NAV dimension relationship mapping which could affect composite table joins"},{"id":112148,"name":"Performance testing of models with Azure SQL warehouse","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"Azure SQL warehouse performance; PR 24412 (optimized cube definition loading behind feature switch) may improve or change processing timing"}],"summary":"This release is dominated by Copilot and analysis design changes (PRs 24464, 24484, 24499, 24510 and others) that pervasively touch CellSets, CubeModel, DimensionTree, and the Analytics portal — making all Tier-1 analytics tests mandatory. The deferred slicer loading change (PR 24449) and per-user tabular security (PR 24479) are the highest-risk functional changes and drive must-run coverage for slicers, filters, and connection/security tests. DataSource regression is spread across MYOB, Intacct, OData, NAV, and the brand-new Acumatica connector, warranting targeted should-run tests for each affected source. Licensing and processing limit changes (PRs 24467, 24453) require verification of processing triggers and data limit enforcement."}

prs.pr_title: Patching for analysis design and function search tool
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/Copilot (JsonPatchApplicator, PatchAttributes, CopilotModelPatcher) which has maximum blast radius across all products; also touches Portal Copilot tools and CellSet serialization model.

prs.pr_title: Add processing time grace period
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/Licensing/IWarehouseStorageLimitEnforcer and SharedSource/Licensing/LicenseInfo alongside Modeller/Core domain model and Portal controllers — touches licensing infrastructure and multiple product layers.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112846,"type":"Change Request","title":"Cloud Management - Option to suppress processing time limit for a while","state":"Active"}]

prs.pr_title: Approval required for changing current analysis design
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Web.Core/Copilot (ICopilotToolProvider, CopilotContext, CopilotClientProvider) which underpins all Copilot interactions across web endpoints, plus Portal Copilot controllers, CellSet serialization model, and logging extensions.

prs.pr_title: Fix AI notification creation/evaluation
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/Caching/RequestCacheHelper and SharedSource/Web.Core/Caching/WebRequestCacheHelper alongside OLAP connection caching (AdomdConnectionPool, CubeCaching, ZapMemberCache) — changes to shared caching infrastructure have maximum blast radius on all data retrieval.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113211,"type":"Bug","title":"Zap AI on Teams app unable to create a notification because of a backend failure","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Optimized Cube Definition loading behind feature switch.
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/Resources/DataSources (ICubeConnectionInfo, IDatabaseConnectionInfo) and SharedSource/Query/Connections, plus OLAP connection pool and TOM/AMO/ADOMD data managers — changes to shared data source interfaces and query connections affect all cube-based reporting.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112955,"type":"Change Request","title":"Data Hub and Zap Live analytics against Power BI performance","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: use JsonSerializer to correctly escape exception message for Json
prs.risk_reasoning: Single file in SharedSource/Web.Core/Mvc/ServerSentEvents.cs — any change to SharedSource/Web.Core carries Score 1 blast radius across all web endpoints, even though the fix itself is a targeted JSON escaping correction.

prs.pr_title: skip view testing if it's been done already
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/FeatureSwitching which has the highest blast radius across all products, combined with a pipeline step change in Modeller/Core that affects cube processing.

prs.pr_title: Dimension tree copilot tools
prs.risk_reasoning: 50 files spanning Copilot, DimensionTree, QueryDesign, CellSets, CubeModel, Olap connections, and Portal controls — a large cross-cutting feature touching multiple critical product areas.

prs.pr_title: Add per-user security for tabular server connections
prs.risk_reasoning: Security changes to per-user connection handling combined with SharedSource/Core/CoreSwitch and FeatureSwitchGroup modifications — security + shared core is the highest possible blast radius combination.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113095,"type":"Change Request","title":"Security for data hub analytics against power bi/AAS","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Initial analysis design copilot
prs.risk_reasoning: 56 files modifying CellSets serialization models, CubeModel, Olap connection caching, and Copilot tools simultaneously — changes to serialization and connection layers affect all report execution paths.

prs.pr_title: Copilot tool display names
prs.risk_reasoning: Touches SharedSource/Web.Core (ICopilotToolProvider, CopilotToolDisplayNameProvider) which affects all web endpoints, alongside changes across Portal and Modeller Copilot tools.

prs.pr_title: permit exclusion of history columns from key attribute
prs.risk_reasoning: 57 files spanning Modeller/Core pipeline, validation rules, AnalysisServices pipeline processor, and BI/Resources query and slicer evaluators — multiple major product areas modified simultaneously.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113101,"type":"Bug","title":"Cannot exclude history columns from dimension's key attribute","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Deep link spike
prs.risk_reasoning: 84 files across CubeModel, CubeModelBuilders, Modeller/Core analytics, AnalysisServices, Serialization.Core, and Portal — a spike touching nearly every product layer with deep link additions to core data structures.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: 45+ files across Presentation/PivotTables (cell content types, matrix, renderers, factories), Resources/CellSets, and Resources/Olap — broad changes to core pivot table rendering and cell content infrastructure with high report output risk.

prs.pr_title: update SQL generation UI
prs.risk_reasoning: 38 files spanning Modeller/AnalysisServices, Modeller/UI SQL expression editor and commands, Portal activity logging, and auth config template — changes to SSAS expression deployer and SQL generation UI touch multiple Modeller subsystems.

prs.pr_title: Data limits ui changes
prs.risk_reasoning: 26 files across Portal Client data limits UI, Modeller/UI/DataLimits, and Modeller/UI/Processing limit evaluator — modifies processing time limit evaluation logic shared between Portal and Modeller, affecting enforcement behaviour.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113132,"type":"Bug","title":"Processing time limit enforcement - no email received if the model is copied from another user","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Copilot improvements, AI tools API and more evals
prs.risk_reasoning: 47 files introducing a new AIToolsApi controller and modifying existing Portal and Modeller Copilot tools — new API surface plus changes to live Copilot chat and pipeline providers increases regression surface.

prs.pr_title: Measures deploy to tabular using the column name
prs.risk_reasoning: 63 files changing how measures are named during tabular deployment, touching Modeller/Core domain model, validation rules, Ssas.Tabular model generation, and serialization — high risk of breaking existing model deployments.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112859,"type":"Change Request","title":"Remove the prefix from measure names in tabular","state":"Pending review"}]

prs.pr_title: SQL Copilot POC
prs.risk_reasoning: 74 files overhauling Modeller/Core pipeline domain model (calculation settings, validation rules), multiple Modeller/Serialization.Core converters, and SerializationModel — despite POC label, the breadth of core domain and serialization changes carries high regression risk.

prs.pr_title: Attribute parameterization for deep links
prs.risk_reasoning: 58 files across Modeller/Core analytics and validation, CubeModel, CubeModelBuilders, Ssas.Tabular table generation, and Portal pivot table renderer — broad attribute parameterisation change touching multiple Modeller core subsystems and report rendering.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: 85-file cleanup across Modeller/Core pipeline internals (schema visitors, step updaters, transforms) and AnalysisServices cube generation — high volume of changes to core data processing logic with significant regression potential.

prs.pr_title: add title to table select all directive
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Web.Core shared table selection component — per scoring guide SharedSource/Web.Core has blast radius across all web endpoints, though the actual change (adding a title attribute) is small.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112927,"type":"Bug","title":"Sage X3 Cloud - No toolip or Could not read the total selected companies in Configure Source screen","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Data source filter converter - Fix incorrect comparable values
prs.risk_reasoning: Bug fix to data source filter converter comparable values — correctness fix to existing functionality that could affect filter behaviour across all data source connections using this converter.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112116,"type":"Change Request","title":"Partitioning support for Access data sources","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: MYOB page recovery
prs.risk_reasoning: Bug fix for MYOB page recovery — isolated to the MYOB connector, which is a single ERP connector with a defined blast radius boundary.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112116,"type":"Change Request","title":"Partitioning support for Access data sources","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Fix storage engine check for measure naming
prs.risk_reasoning: Single-file fix to ModelTaskPaneController in Modeller UI client, isolated to storage engine check logic for measure naming in the task pane.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112859,"type":"Change Request","title":"Remove the prefix from measure names in tabular","state":"Pending review"}]

prs.pr_title: Add deferred slicer loading support on server
prs.risk_reasoning: Adds deferred slicer loading to CellSetApiController and CellSetResultBuilder — new behaviour on an existing endpoint but changes are focused and the feature is gated server-side.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112955,"type":"Change Request","title":"Data Hub and Zap Live analytics against Power BI performance","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Using spans for inline boxes
prs.risk_reasoning: ClientShared UI component change (inline box markup) is consumed across Portal; swapping block elements to spans can break layout or styling in multiple product areas if any consumer relied on block-level behaviour.

prs.pr_title: Allow copilot chat to continue on error
prs.risk_reasoning: Nine files modifying existing Copilot chat error handling behaviour (ChatBubble, ChatEventsList, CopilotChat, CopilotChatController) — contained within Portal Copilot UI with no shared infrastructure changes.

prs.pr_title: BC Cloud - Add Service-to-Service (Client Credentials) Authentication
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding a new Service-to-Service OAuth flow to an existing BC Cloud connector touches authentication code paths; while additive, auth changes in a live connector carry elevated risk of breaking existing credential flows.

prs.pr_title: Breaking up cube def tools and improving analysis design copilot
prs.risk_reasoning: Five files refactoring Copilot tools within Portal (splitting CubeDefinitionCopilotTools from AnalysisCopilotTools) — isolated to the Copilot feature area with no shared infrastructure touched.

prs.pr_title: Intacct - AP Aging Fixes
prs.risk_reasoning: Bug fix to Intacct AP Aging calculations modifies existing data-shaping logic; fixes can unintentionally alter output for customers who built reports against the previous (buggy) behaviour.

prs.pr_title: NAV dimension relationship mapping fixes
prs.risk_reasoning: Dimension relationship mapping is core to how NAV financial data is structured; fixes here can change the shape of dimension data surfaced in models and reports for all NAV customers.

prs.pr_title: Intacct - Align AP Aging columns with AR Aging
prs.risk_reasoning: Column alignment change in Intacct AP Aging modifies the schema of an existing data set; any saved reports or models referencing old column names or positions could break.

prs.pr_title: OData - Migrate OData HTTP layer to HttpCommon.HttpClient
prs.risk_reasoning: Migrating OData's HTTP layer to a shared HttpClient implementation changes all HTTP communication for every OData-based data source; HTTP-level changes can introduce subtle differences in timeout, retry, or header handling.

prs.pr_title: block LastChild on string measures
prs.risk_reasoning: Single validation rule file adding a restriction on LastChild aggregation for string measures — isolated change within existing validation logic, contained blast radius.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113110,"type":"Bug","title":"Cube processing error when string measure is set to last child","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Xero in-memory filter for journals JournalDate column
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding an in-memory filter for Xero's JournalDate column changes how journal data is filtered before being surfaced to models; incorrect filter logic could silently exclude or include wrong journal records.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112116,"type":"Change Request","title":"Partitioning support for Access data sources","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Utility styles to make space for vertical scrollbars
prs.risk_reasoning: Utility style additions to ClientShared for scrollbar spacing are shared across all Portal consumers; incorrect spacing values could misalign layouts in reports, dashboards, or the modeller UI.

prs.pr_title: Prevent blocking task when retrieving wamp connections from the pool
prs.risk_reasoning: Single file async fix to WAMP connection pool in Modeller/UI; threading changes carry moderate concurrency risk but are isolated to the Modeller data source layer.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113088,"type":"Bug","title":"Sage X3 Cloud, Sage 100, and Syspro data sources were stuck on loading on .2 build after testing connection","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Add aiSearch icon
prs.risk_reasoning: Additive icon asset addition to ClientShared — no logic changes, purely extending the icon set.

prs.pr_title: Add icons for aiSparkle and aiGenerate
prs.risk_reasoning: Two new AI icon additions to ClientShared — fully additive with no modification to existing components.

prs.pr_title: filter cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: General cleanup in the DataSources repo; no indication of logic changes, so risk is low but non-zero as refactors can silently alter behaviour.

prs.pr_title: Add Ai disclaimer to Zap Ai chat
prs.risk_reasoning: Additive change adding a disclaimer UI element to CopilotChat.tsx with supporting text resources — no existing logic modified.

prs.pr_title: Update portal binding redirects to fix assembly resolution error
prs.risk_reasoning: Single change to Directory.Packages.props to fix an assembly binding redirect — non-runtime fix, but incorrect package versions could cause assembly resolution failures across all projects.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: Miscellaneous cleanup scoped to DataSources; low risk assuming no functional logic is altered, but cleanup PRs occasionally remove code that is still in use.

prs.pr_title: avoid footguns
prs.risk_reasoning: Defensive code hardening in DataSources; title implies removing footgun-prone patterns, which is low risk but could alter edge-case behaviour that downstream connector code depended on.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: Miscellaneous cleanup scoped to DataSources; minimal functional impact expected.

prs.pr_title: Add missing tool display name for SetCurrentAnalysisDesign
prs.risk_reasoning: Additive-only change adding a missing display name string for a Copilot tool; no existing logic modified, test utility update is non-runtime.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: Miscellaneous cleanup scoped to DataSources; low functional risk.

prs.pr_title: Move process type dropdown above pipeline selector to prevent cutoff
prs.risk_reasoning: Two HTML template files reordering a UI dropdown — purely presentational layout fix with no logic changes.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113080,"type":"Bug","title":"Process popup dialog cuts off \"Process type\" dropdown at 100% zoom","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Acumatica Data Source
prs.risk_reasoning: Brand-new Acumatica data source connector is isolated additive work; existing connectors and shared data source infrastructure are unchanged, so regression blast radius is low.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: Miscellaneous cleanup scoped to DataSources; low functional risk.

prs.pr_title: REST - Add string list variable support
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding string list variable support to the REST connector is a purely additive capability; existing REST queries and variable handling are unaffected as long as the new type is handled as an additional case.

prs.pr_title: text update I forgot to include in the last PR
prs.risk_reasoning: Pure text/localisation changes to PipelineText resx files and a client typings declaration — no runtime logic modified.

prs.pr_title: Move build instructions to a skill
prs.risk_reasoning: Changes are exclusively to a GitHub skill markdown file and AGENTS.md — no runtime code affected.

prs.pr_title: Update testing note skill from feedback
prs.risk_reasoning: Single prompt markdown file update — no runtime code, purely documentation.

prs.pr_title: Acumatica - Add missing Microsoft.TypeScript.MSBuild package reference
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding a missing build package reference is a non-runtime configuration fix; no production logic is changed.

prs.pr_title: Bumping version to 2026.3
prs.risk_reasoning: Version number bump in GitInfo.txt only — no runtime code changed.

testRecommendations.refineSummary: This release is dominated by Copilot and analysis design changes (PRs 24464, 24484, 24499, 24510 and others) that pervasively touch CellSets, CubeModel, DimensionTree, and the Analytics portal — making all Tier-1 analytics tests mandatory. The deferred slicer loading change (PR 24449) and per-user tabular security (PR 24479) are the highest-risk functional changes and drive must-run coverage for slicers, filters, and connection/security tests. DataSource regression is spread across MYOB, Intacct, OData, NAV, and the brand-new Acumatica connector, warranting targeted should-run tests for each affected source. Licensing and processing limit changes (PRs 24467, 24453) require verification of processing triggers and data limit enforcement.
